title: Repeal the "Not Very Good" Omnibus Bill

posts.author: Asqii
posts.rawText:
Author: Jebediah Crumplesnatch MP
Sponsor: N/A
Type: Act of Parliament

A
BILL
TO
Repeal the Miscellaneous Changes and Foreign Affairs Omnibus Act

Preamble: This bill will repeal the omnibus bill in its entirety.

1. Section
(a) The Miscellaneous Changes and Foreign Affairs Omnibus act is repealed in its entirety immediately.

Enactment: This Act comes into force immediately upon passage.

posts.author: Kingdom of Regalis
posts.rawText:
"By the authority invested the in Kingdom of Regalis, and in the loyal people of Azalea Isles, I hereby declare the Repeal the Not Very Good Omnibus Bill Act to be law in the Isles, with the full force of enactment."
- Queen Eleanora of the Kingdom of Regalis
